pr.title: Record: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence + MuonEq-R + Full GPTQ — val_bpb 1.0940 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines 4096-vocab widening, depth recurrence, MuonEq-R, and full int6 GPTQ with Brotli packing to fit the 16MB constraint.
techniques: Depth recurrence on layers 4-5 to virtualize 13-layer capacity
MuonEq-R with row-normalized gradients and higher weight decay for quant-friendly weights
Full GPTQ int6 plus Brotli-11/byte-shuffle compression
